title: Glass Button
summary: A frosted translucent button with a light top-edge highlight that brightens on hover.
description: Combines a translucent fill, backdrop blur, an inset top highlight, and a subtle border to make a glass button that sits naturally over colorful/photo backgrounds.
browser_support: All modern browsers; backdrop-filter needs -webkit- in Safari.
performance_notes: backdrop-filter has a cost; fine for a few buttons. Provide a solid fallback where unsupported.
accessibility_notes: Translucency can hurt label contrast over busy backgrounds — keep the tint dark enough and test. Real button with a focus ring.
ai_usage: Use over imagery/gradients (glass needs something behind it to blur). Translucent background + backdrop-filter blur + 1px light border + an inset top highlight (box-shadow inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.3)). Include -webkit-backdrop-filter and a solid fallback. Verify label contrast against the worst-case background; keep the focus-visible ring.
source:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>Glass Button</title>
  <script type="application/json" id="effect-meta">
  {
    "id": "glass-button",
    "title": "Glass Button",
    "summary": "A frosted translucent button with a light top-edge highlight that brightens on hover.",
    "description": "Combines a translucent fill, backdrop blur, an inset top highlight, and a subtle border to make a glass button that sits naturally over colorful/photo backgrounds.",
    "theme": "glass-neumorphism",
    "categories": ["surface", "glass", "button"],
    "tags": ["glassmorphism", "button", "frosted", "backdrop-filter", "translucent"],
    "tech": ["css"],
    "era": "2020s",
    "difficulty": "beginner",
    "dependencies": [],
    "browser_support": "All modern browsers; backdrop-filter needs -webkit- in Safari.",
    "performance_notes": "backdrop-filter has a cost; fine for a few buttons. Provide a solid fallback where unsupported.",
    "accessibility_notes": "Translucency can hurt label contrast over busy backgrounds — keep the tint dark enough and test. Real button with a focus ring.",
    "customization": [
      { "name": "--glass", "description": "Tint/opacity", "default": "rgba(255,255,255,.12)" },
      { "name": "--blur", "description": "Backdrop blur", "default": "10px" }
    ],
    "variations": ["Dark glass over light backgrounds", "Pill radius", "Icon-only glass button"],
    "related": ["glassmorphism-card", "fill-sweep-button"],
    "ai_usage": "Use over imagery/gradients (glass needs something behind it to blur). Translucent background + backdrop-filter blur + 1px light border + an inset top highlight (box-shadow inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.3)). Include -webkit-backdrop-filter and a solid fallback. Verify label contrast against the worst-case background; keep the focus-visible ring."
  }
  </script>
  <style>
    :root { --glass: rgba(255,255,255,.12); --blur: 10px; }
    html, body { height: 100%; margin: 0; }
    body { display: grid; place-items: center; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg,#7c5cff,#2dd4bf 50%,#f0abfc); }
    .glass-btn {
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4); cursor: pointer; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem;
      padding: .85rem 2rem; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--glass);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(var(--blur)); backdrop-filter: blur(var(--blur));
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.5), 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.2);
      transition: background .25s;
    }
    .glass-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.22); }
    .glass-btn:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #fff; outline-offset: 3px; }
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .glass-btn { transition: none; } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <button class="glass-btn">Frosted action</button>
</body>
</html>
